summary: The domainMASSTs repository contains code and data for microbeMASST, plantMASST, tissueMASST, microbiomeMASST, and foodMASST.

microbeMASST is available as a standalone web application at https://masst.gnps2.org/microbemasst/. plantMASST is available as a standalone web application at https://masst.gnps2.org/plantmasst/. tissueMASST is available as a standalone web
